title: What to Look For When Dating | #shorts
full_text: Brij, you need to go on one date with an Indian girl, just so you know what it's like to date somebody your own culture. >> Okay, you know what? Fine. I'll go on one date with one Indian girl. Please, please recommend who you think is best. >> My friend's daughter, Gia. Beautiful, adorable girl. 1570 SAT. >> Why would I care about her SAT? >> Because that's the only thing that matters. How you think she's going to get into med school? >> Why do I care about med school? >> Well, what else matters? What's your criterias? >> Well, I don't want to get into my criteria with you. >> Why not? Because it's just that's not something you do with your parents. >> Who who got into your brain? Who told you that that's not something you discuss with your parents? You think all these Indian people in India getting married without discussing with their parents? That is the whole criteria is what I told you. SAT score is so easy. Why you think all the colleges in America use them?
